task: Display a color image array (RGB) — do not apply a colormap
error_location: line 1: cmap='gray' converts color image to grayscale
clarification_query: How should a 3-channel RGB image be displayed without colormap distortion?
explanation: cmap='gray' maps single scalar values to gray shades. For RGB arrays, omit cmap so the 3 channels map to R, G, B.
